text:
In generale l’ho trovato molto più satanico anche grazie alla storia nettamente diversa dai primi due the conjuring, senza la solita casa e la solita famiglia presa di mira. Tra un stile demoniaco e satanico, c’è molta violenza e potenza nelle scene horror specialmente inizio e fine, secondo me girate impeccabilmente. Nelle altre scene il livello di tensione non è così poi tanto alto ma le ho trovate ben costruite anche se gli jump scare non spaventano poi così tanto.

La storia assume a tratti anche un senso investigativo data la complessità del enigma da scovare che coinvolge una cerchia ampia di persone. La trama infatti per questo è molto più dinamica grazie all’intervallarsi tra scene calme, di mistero, horror, jumps scare, tutte amalgamate in modo che ho trovato ben organizzato e chiaro

Trama e narrazione le ho trovate ben curate, tutti i cerchi si chiudono anche se la storia è abbastanza complessa, le scene hanno un perfetto senso e non rimangono buchi o dubbi perché viene spiegato tutto.
La sceneggiatura anche questa l’ho trovata su un buon livello, non ottimo perché ci sono 2 3 sbavature, tutto sommato trascurabili 

Personalmente trovo la regia di chaves molto curata e fresca: sa dare molta varietà alle scene e molto movimento alla ripresa quando serve. Inoltre usa tutti gli elementi horror che esistono tra luci, ombre, riflessi, visioni mentali, distorsioni della realtà dei personaggi e soprattutto la fotografia molto intonata con l’ambiente e suggestiva grazie alla palette mantenuta in tutto il film.

Tutto sommato non spaventa come gli altri due the conjuring ma recupera questa mancanza con la violenza e la suggestività di certe scene bene architettate che io ho adorato. Da appassionato horror e fan di questa saga, a me è piaciuto molto, merita molto e lo metto al pari degli altri due

text: Okay so I watched the movie and I am here to leave a review first of all I didn't found this movie scary or horror that much comparing to other Conjuring movies  but this movie spoke a lot about logics and facts which the other movies never did..In the other movies it was like some sorta creepy house but in this movie it wasn't it was more to logic and facts.. Because this movie was made recently I thought there is gonna be some modern and latest and darker touch in the movie however it didn't stand out on my expectations.. Talking about other stuffs like the chemistry of Arne and Debbie aka Ruairi and Sarah and Ed and Lorraine aka Vera and Patrick was everything in basis of chemistry I would rate it 100 but  again it was not a romantic movie ik you have to have chemistry to communicate but I expected more..All the actors performed really really well no doubt on that but tbh the storyline disappointed me :)

💖🖤❤️今後は気をライブ配信の再編ありがとうです！この日のライブ配信は、かならりやばかったですね！１万人を超える人が見ていたもん（笑）やっぱり人参最高！まさかのカメラ切り忘れでやら1かしたのもドキドキでした,.
 💖🖤在整個人類歷史上，強者，富人和具有狡猾特質的人捕食部落，氏族，城鎮，城市和鄉村中的弱者，無`'守和貧窮成員。然而，人類的生存意願迫使那些被拒絕，被剝奪或摧毀的基本需求的人們找到了一種生活方式，並繼續將其DNA融入不斷發展的人類社會。.
 說到食物，不要以為那些被拒絕的人只吃垃圾。相反，他們學會了在被忽視的肉類和蔬菜中尋找營養。他們學會了清潔，切塊，調味和慢燉慢燉的野菜和肉類，在食品
 17-летний аристократ влюбляется в доброго, но бедного художника на борту роскошного и незадачливого R.M.S. Титаник. Титаник - это американский фильм 1997 года, снятый и снятый Джеймсом Кэмероном. В этом фильме рассказывается история любви Джека и Роуз (их играют Леонардо Ди Каприо и Кейт Уинслет), которые пришли из разных социальных слоев на борту Титаника RMS, затонувшего во время своего первого рейса 15 апреля 1912 года. 00:01

text: This is like the same movie every time:  some demonic spirit is in a house. there is a family in the house with kids, someone sees ghosts, no one believes that person.  something happens with the person who sees the ghosts, now the family believes them. the police get involved, but they don't understand superstitious phenomenon so the family seeks out ghost experts lorraine & her husband. lorraine & her husband waltz around for a few minutes, before deciding it's for sure a demon that's bothering the family. there is some family heirloom that is reminiscent of prior stresses in the family history. as lorraine & her husband as well as some family members travel into the ethereal demon space to confront the ghost, they use the heirloom to banish the demon. the family gets back to normal kind of, the police accept lorraine & her husband's ways. but then, surprise, there's something off about the final conclusion of this event. its not over once again. and there's another movie.

text: Yo. What the fuck is this shit? Like seriously? If anything, you're giving Christians an accuse for how awful they act. "Oh yes I had to hang this gay man because he was the devil" or even the lazily produced "the devil made me do it" like seriously? Literally the only person I can think of that would find this shit even slightly scary is the autistic christian girl I work with, and quite honestly the only reason she would think so is because "the devil" is in what I can assume is the title. If anything this film series is a complete farce on the horror genre. Why does religion seem to be intertwined with horror. It's like those who belive God have an obligation to belive in a devil. text:
Please read this carefully ;

Every one of us has sinned against God. We’ve lied, we’ve stolen, we’ve sinned sexually, and we’ve taken His name in vain; which makes us liars, thieves, fornicators and blasphemers ... Yet this is only four of our many transgressions .

The problem is, we can never ‘outweigh’ our sin with good works because God is perfect in Holiness, meaning his standard is beyond our reach. He is also perfect in Justice, meaning, he will bring EVERY sin to light. The punishment for our sin is death, and Hell; a place of Eternal Fire, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .

Fortunately God is also perfect in Love, so 2000 years ago He left his throne in heaven, and came to earth as a man named Jesus Christ. While here, he lived a perfectly righteous life, only to take the punishment that We deserved; Our sinless creator became Our sin, and endured a gruesome death on a cross for our sake . 
Right before he died, he said ‘it is finished’ .. meaning, the debt for our sins has been paid in full. And on the third day, he defeated death and rose from the grave. So now, we can go free from the wrath of God’s judgement not by earning it, but rather, as a free gift of grace ..

Except gifts can be either accepted or rejected. So this is what you must do in response ; 

Humbly admit to God that you have sinned against him. Then, confess with your mouth that Jesus Christ is Lord, Your savior, and the ruler of your life from this moment forward ( Romans 10:9 ) .

Jesus Christ awaits YOU this very moment. Do not put off surrendering your life to him, because your tomorrow isn’t guaranteed... and as it is written ( Hebrews 9 : 27 )  ;

text: Either this is a bad transition time for CGI or COVID has really affected post production quality because all of these "skip theater, straight to streaming blockbusters" have had terrible CGI, especially when it comes to background rendering and green screen. I mean it was abysmal in the new Mortal Kombat and it is apparent in this trailer during the cliff scene. I guarantee it would have looked more polished had COVID not happened during most of these movies post-production. I mean luckily Mortal Kombat was bad enough on it's own in a cheesy way that it almost felt nostalgic and "so-bad-it's-good" sort of way. I still have high hopes for this one despite the James Wan departure. Even with Insidious, despite the numerous directors and the distinct lack of quality James Wan produced, none of them were terrible and at least entertaining enough the first watch. Anyways I digress...excited for the movie, disappointed in the clear disregard for CGI, unless as I said earlier, we are going through a transition period, similar to when CGI first came around and it looked like video game graphics of the PS1 era.

Please read this carefully ;

Every one of us has sinned against God. We’ve lied, we’ve stolen, we’ve sinned sexually, and we’ve taken His name in vain; which makes us liars, thieves, fornicators and blasphemers ... Yet this is only four of our many transgressions .

The problem is, we can never ‘outweigh’ our sin with good works because God is perfect in Holiness, meaning his standard is beyond our reach. He is also perfect in Justice, meaning, he will bring EVERY sin to light. The punishment for our sin is death, and Hell; a place of Eternal Fire, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .

Fortunately God is also perfect in Love, so 2000 years ago, Jesus Christ left his throne in heaven and came to this earth. While here, he lived a perfectly righteous life, only to take the punishment that We deserved; Our sinless creator became Our sin, and endured a gruesome death on a cross for our sake . 
Right before he died, he said ‘it is finished’ .. meaning, the debt for our sins has been paid in full. And on the third day, he defeated death and rose from the grave. So now, we can go free from the wrath of God’s judgement not by earning it, but rather, as a free gift of grace ..

Except gifts can be either accepted or rejected. So this is what you must do in response ; 

Humbly admit to God that you have sinned against him. Then, confess with your mouth that Jesus Christ is Lord, Your savior, and the ruler of your life from this moment forward ( Romans 10:9 ) . 

Do these things, and you will be saved .

If you do so sincerely, God will grant you a new heart which no longer finds comfort in sin, but instead desires to read and obey his word. He will also grant you Eternal life in his presence; The greatest pleasure on earth doesn’t even come close to what God is preparing for believers in the afterlife  . 

You’ve been informed ; Now the choice is yours. What you do with this information will determine where you will be for ETERNITY.. Meaning, this is the single most critical decision you will EVER make; And all of us here, whether believer or atheist, know deep down that every last word here is true  .

Jesus Christ awaits YOU this very moment. Do not put off surrendering your life to him, because your tomorrow isn’t guaranteed... and as it is written ( Hebrews 9 : 27 )  ;

‘It is appointed unto man ONCE to die, but after this, THE JUDGMENT’  .

Which really doesn’t make sense...? Especially when in the real world case, the Warren’s provided evidence of other worldly tampering in the case. text: This one looks ehh. The other ones scared the Crap out of me. I remember the 1st time i watched one, was with my mom, we happened to be homeless at the time, staying in a garage at my sisters. Anyways, my sister came home from work, sat down to watch the rest with us, and then all the sudden, the light to the stairs turns on. All her kids in the basement are asleep and her BF is upstairs. So that scared the crap outta us that day. Im sure one of those kids happened to be up. Had to be. Im not one to believe in ghosts, but ive had witnessed some things that just cant be explained (like our Microwave, at night, it will randomly turn on. One night, went downstairs to get a Pop/Soda and it was on, nothing new so i turned it off. Thing is, as I opened to fridge to grab my Pop/Soda, the thing made the Beeps like you're pressing the buttons, and set itself to 3:50. That scared me. To hear it as if someone was pressing the buttons and turning it on. How do you explain that. Nothing ever sent chills down my spine like that night)

text:
Please read this carefully ;

Every one of us has sinned against God. We’ve lied, we’ve stolen, we’ve sinned sexually, and we’ve taken His name in vain; which makes us liars, thieves, fornicators and blasphemers ... Yet this is only four of our many transgressions .

The problem is, we can never ‘outweigh’ our sin with good works because God is perfect in Holiness, meaning his standard is beyond our reach. He is also perfect in Justice, meaning, he will bring EVERY sin to light. The punishment for our sin is death, and Hell; a place of Eternal Fire, where there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth .

Fortunately God is also perfect in Love, so 2000 years ago, Jesus Christ left his throne in heaven and came to this earth. While here, he lived a perfectly righteous life, only to take the punishment that We deserved; Our sinless creator became Our sin, and endured a gruesome death on a cross for our sake . 
Right before he died, he said ‘it is finished’ .. meaning, the debt for our sins has been paid in full. And on the third day, he defeated death and rose from the grave. So now, we can go free from the wrath of God’s judgement not by earning it, but rather, as a free gift of grace ..

Except gifts can be either accepted or rejected. So this is what you must do in response ; 

Humbly admit to God that you have sinned against him. Then, confess with your mouth that Jesus Christ is Lord, Your savior, and the ruler of your life from this moment forward ( Romans 10:9 ) . 

Do these things, and you will be saved .

If you do so sincerely, God will grant you a new heart which no longer finds comfort in sin, but instead desires to read and obey his word. He will also grant you Eternal life in his presence; The greatest pleasure on earth doesn’t even come close to what God is preparing for believers in the afterlife  . 

You’ve been informed ; Now the choice is yours. What you do with this information will determine where you will be for ETERNITY.. Meaning, this is the single most critical decision you will EVER make; And all of us here, whether believer or atheist, know deep down that every last word here is true  .

Jesus Christ awaits YOU this very moment. Do not put off surrendering your life to him, because your tomorrow isn’t guaranteed... and as it is written ( Hebrews 9 : 27 ) ;

‘It is appointed unto man ONCE to die, but after this, THE JUDGMENT’.

All Subtitle Available



!💖🖤❤️今後は気をライブ配信の再編ありがとうです！この日のライブ配信は、かならりやばかったですね！１万人を超える人が見ていたもん（笑）やっぱり人参最高！まさかのカメラ切り忘れでやら1かしたのもドキドキでした,.
 💖🖤在整個人類歷史上，強者，富人和具有狡猾特質的人捕食部落，氏族，城鎮，城市和鄉村中的弱者，無`'守和貧窮成員。然而，人類的生存意願迫使那些被拒絕，被剝奪或摧毀的基本需求的人們找到了一種生活方式，並繼續將其DNA融入不斷發展的人類社會。.
 說到食物，不要以為那些被拒絕的人只吃垃圾。相反，他們學會了在被忽視的肉類和蔬菜中尋找營養。他們學會了清潔，切塊，調味和慢燉慢燉的野菜和肉類，在食品:
√™ Lorsqu'une pilule qui donne aux utilisateurs cinq minutes de super pouvoirs inattendus arrive dans les rues de
la Nouvelle-Orléans, un adolescent marchand et un policier local doivent faire équipe avec un ancien soldat pour
faire tomber le groupe..

Things that qualify a movie as a Conjuring movie:

Loraine saying "Its a beacon for the inhuman spirit" 
Loraine saying "Something terrible happened here."
Loraine saying "This thing has latched itself to your family"
Loraine saying" You have a lot of spirits in here, but there is one I'm most worried about because it is so hateful"
Ed saying "Whatever Lorraine feels, sees, touches, it takes a toll on her."

I love the conjurings but these have to be said at least once in every movie.

text:
One big problem I have with all of this "devil" stuff... The Devil is a Christian construct. Christianity is not the "one true religion". Hell, even the Bible isn't the original Bible. Look up the lost Gospels, especially the Gospel of Judas. It talks of multiple gods/angels, and Yeshua/Jesus states the God his apostles worship is not his father. That the creators of man were Sakkalas and Nebero. 2 of... I think 12 Angel-Gods? The story has been altered to fit a monotheistic religion when it is more henotheistic in that they chose 1 God out of a group to worship. The Jewish religion is also henotheistic as they chose Yahweh to worship out of a set of gods. 

This isn't to say the paranormal aspects couldn't exist. I would frame "demons" as more of a parasitic higher dimensional being. Also, not all "demons" were considered to be bad, either. And following demonology, there are more things, theoretically, than just angels and demons. Satan would be considered as just another demon as there is an entire classification of entities called "devils" separate from demons. 

Most of this is for sake of argument, mind you. Just saying the scope under Christianity is extremely limited in terms of understanding what possibly exists.

text:
REST IN PEACE?
I have come to be peeved when, even devout Christians, say “May their soul rest in peace.” This statement shows absolute ignorance of the content and teaching in the Bible, regardless of your denomination. First of all, no soul goes to “rest”. They are either in heaven or hell until their soul is reunited with the resurrected body for judgement if you didn’t know JESUS. Or we are awarded for our stewardship in addition to our blood  bought reservation for eternity in Heaven. “Rest in peace” infers an eternity in oblivion or stasis where we “sleep” forever. Even if you mean ‘rest from work’, that ‘rest’ is non sequitur because even though we will not sweat in Heaven, we will work for Him.

text: Hello Warner Bros. I wanna email you and tell you about how you can get away with offensive media easily. It seems there have been lots of problems getting things age-appropriate or getting things to be not at all offensive. I personally want you to understand that the way you made your movies back then were not bad in any way. The way you should understand if something is wrong or unacceptable is by hearing the thoughts from the target audience that relates to it. This is a situation a lot of companies are dealing with and I want you to be the one to share it with more people because I think that these companies deserve to get away with much more stuff than wanted. It's easy not to get in trouble, all you have to do is find the right person to see it and if the target demographic is offended or horribly influenced, that's when you can know to stop. I wanna tell you this because you are my favorite company ever and the best way for you to avoid having to restrict so much is simple and easy. Just show something to the right person that either is targeted to watch or is the person you're scared could get offended and let them be the one to choose if the thing deserves to be removed, fixed, or unreleased. In conclusion, the thing I want you and other companies to understand is that as long as the target audience is not offended or horribly influenced, there is no reason for censoring. From one of your best fans: Jack Rodak
